documents.text: "The only way to do great work is to love what you do," said Steve Jobs during a commencement address. He added, "Stay hungry, stay foolish."
In an interview, Marie Curie remarked, "Nothing in life is to be feared, it is only to be understood." She continued by explaining the importance of curiosity in science.
During the press conference, the CEO stated: "Our quarterly growth exceeded expectations, and we remain committed to innovation." No further quotes were given on financial details.
